logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {timestamp: now(), level: "INFO", correlationId: vars.correlationId, traceId: vars.traceId, service: p("api.name"), event: "REQUEST_RECEIVED"}]
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {timestamp: now(), level: "INFO", correlationId: vars.correlationId, traceId: vars.traceId, service: p("api.name"), event: "REQUEST_COMPLETED"}]
